form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 46-day let-up. Most recently held ground to the line 3rd of 14 at this track on February 19 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Aeroinvincible carrying 61kg at $8.80. The race before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 14 at this track on January 25 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Turin Champions with 60.5kg at $4.10. Big chance to find winning form.
